headline: Expert Warns: California Taxes Harming “Big Wealth Driver in the State” as Billionaires Flee
summary: The competition between states for talent, capital, and businesses has intensified over the past decade. Remote work, lower moving costs, and the rise of digital businesses have made it easier than ever for entrepreneurs to choose where they live and build companies. Investors have watched as states with lower taxes and more business-friendly policies attracted ... Expert Warns: California Taxes Harming “Big Wealth Driver in the State” as Billionaires Flee

headline: BALI: A Hidden Covered Call ETF That Could Be Better Than You Think
summary: iShares BALI ETF review: 7.8% yield, conservative options overlay, lower volatility but capped upside and tax quirks.

headline: Darren Woods’ Game Plan at Exxon Mobil: Produce More Oil for Less Money
summary: Exxon Mobil  annual production just hit its highest level in over 40 years, allowing the company to play a central role in supplying the world with oil during the Iran war.  CEO Darren Woods’ decision to ramp up output in locations as diverse as Guyana, Texas, and Papua New Guinea has also paid off for shareholders.  Woods told investors in May he is proud to have kept his “pedal to the metal.”
